releaseNotes:
🚀 Major Update v1.1.1

🔥 New Features:
• CONNECT SYSTEM added (Controller / Receiver / Hybrid modes)
• App Updates screen + official download system

🧠 Improvements:
• Signature learning upgraded for better accuracy
• Advanced USSD execution improved (more stable & faster)
• Receiver sync and real-time feedback enhanced
• Forwarded transaction tracking improved

🛠 Fixes:
• Fixed duplicate forwarded log crash
• Improved Controller Dashboard stability
• Cleaned USSD Console status display
• Better transaction status handling

⚡ Overall: Faster, smarter, and more stable system
